display.purpose: Hero greeting and large section-card titles only.

headline.purpose: Section-card titles where the display clamp isn't used.

body.purpose: Summary and all descriptions; rendered through prose.

label.purpose: Section badge pills, tooltips, skill chips.

mono.purpose: Tabular date ranges and timeline times only.

shadows.name: dock-ambient
shadows.purpose: The only ambient shadow — a faint primary-tinted glow under the floating bottom dock.

shadows.name: avatar-lift
shadows.purpose: The hero avatar's lift (shadow-lg). The one portrait element allowed a real resting shadow.

shadows.name: tooltip
shadows.purpose: Dock tooltip drop shadow (light); deepens to 0.5 alpha in dark mode.

motion.name: blur-fade-stagger
motion.purpose: Section and item entrance choreography (BlurFade). Quiet, sequential, never looping.

motion.name: state-transition
motion.purpose: Hover and focus state changes on dock icons, cards, and links.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Pressed Graphite fill with inverted text. Present in the kit for forms; the live portfolio mostly uses links.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 2.25rem; padding: 0 1rem; border: none; border-radius: 0.425rem; background: oklch(0.205 0 0); color: oklch(0.985 0 0); font-family: Geist, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.08); transition: background 0.2s; cursor: pointer; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: oklch(0.205 0 0 / 0.9); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px oklch(0.708 0 0); }

components.name: Outline Badge
components.description: Skill / technology tag. Paper fill, hairline border, muted text.
components.css: .ds-badge-outline { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; height: 1.5rem; padding: 0 0.5rem; border: 1px solid oklch(0.922 0 0); border-radius: 0.425rem; background: oklch(1 0 0); color: oklch(0.556 0 0); font-family: Geist, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 500; }

components.name: Section Badge
components.description: Filled label pill centered above each section, flanked by a fading hairline rule.
components.css: .ds-badge-section { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 0.25rem 1rem; border: 1px solid oklch(0.922 0 0); border-radius: 0.625rem; background: oklch(0.205 0 0); color: oklch(1 0 0); font-family: Geist, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; }

components.name: Project Card
components.description: Flat at rest with a 1px hairline border; gains a soft tonal ring on hover.
components.html:
Project One

Jan 2024

What this project is and the problem it solves.
components.css: .ds-card { display: flex; flex-direction: column; overflow: hidden; border: 1px solid oklch(0.922 0 0); border-radius: 1.025rem; background: oklch(1 0 0); color: oklch(0.145 0 0); transition: box-shadow 0.2s; cursor: pointer; } .ds-card:hover { box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px oklch(0.97 0 0); } .ds-card-media { height: 12rem; background: oklch(0.97 0 0); } .ds-card-body { padding: 1.5rem; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 0.75rem; font-family: Geist, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-card-body h3 { margin: 0; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 600; } .ds-card-body time { font-size: 0.75rem; color: oklch(0.556 0 0); } .ds-card-body p { margin: 0; font-size: 0.75rem; line-height: 1.6; color: oklch(0.556 0 0); }

components.name: Floating Dock
components.description: Signature chrome — fixed, centered, pill-shaped bar with backdrop blur and the system's only ambient shadow.
components.css: .ds-dock { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem; height: 3.5rem; padding: 0.5rem; border: 1px solid oklch(0.922 0 0); border-radius: 1.5rem; background: oklch(1 0 0 / 0.9); backdrop-filter: blur(40px); box-shadow: 0 0 10px 3px oklch(0.205 0 0 / 0.05); } .ds-dock-icon { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 2.5rem; height: 2.5rem; border: 1px solid oklch(0.922 0 0); border-radius: 1.5rem; background: oklch(1 0 0); color: oklch(0.556 0 0); cursor: pointer; transition: color 0.2s, background 0.2s; } .ds-dock-icon:hover { color: oklch(0.145 0 0); background: oklch(0.97 0 0); } .ds-dock-sep { width: 1px; height: 1.5rem; background: oklch(0.922 0 0); }

narrative.overview: A personal site that behaves like a well-set page rather than a marketing surface. The entire palette is neutral, chroma zero; hierarchy is built like print — near-black ink on near-white paper, generous whitespace, tightly-tracked headings. Restraint is the aesthetic, not a shortfall; the calm is what reads as confidence. The system rejects the bought-template look and SaaS-landing reflexes: no hero-over-gradient, no stock-photo filler, no buzzword copy, no fake logo walls. Motion eases content in and adds one atmospheric texture, never spectacle. A single 42rem column centers everything on a fixed 3.5rem rhythm; the only persistent chrome is a floating bottom dock.
keyCharacteristics: Monochrome, chroma-zero palette in both light and dark themes.
Type-led hierarchy: tight negative tracking on headings, relaxed body leading.
One narrow centered column; fixed vertical rhythm.
Flat by default; depth appears only on interaction.
Quiet, functional motion — entrance and texture, never choreography.

rules.name: The Chroma-Zero Rule
rules.body: Every surface, text, and border color has chroma 0. The only colored value permitted is destructive, and only for errors. Adding a brand accent is a deliberate redesign, not a tweak.

rules.name: The Hairline Rule
rules.body: Borders and dividers are 1px and use Hairline (light) or translucent white (dark). No 2px+ colored stripes, no heavy rules.

rules.name: The One-Family Rule
rules.body: Geist carries display through body. Don't introduce a serif or a second sans for contrast — contrast comes from weight and tracking.

rules.name: The Tight-Heading Rule
rules.body: Headings track negative (-0.025em to -0.04em); body stays at normal tracking. The tension between the two is the editorial signature.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. A shadow must earn its place — floating chrome (the dock) or a hover response, never default card decoration.

dos: Do keep the palette chroma-zero. Build every distinction from contrast, weight, and 1px borders.
Do carry all type in Geist; create hierarchy with size, weight, and negative tracking on headings.
Do keep surfaces flat at rest; let depth appear on hover (tonal ring) or on the floating dock only.
Do hold content to the single 42rem centered column and the 3.5rem section rhythm.
Do keep motion functional: BlurFade entrances and the masked FlickeringGrid texture, and respect prefers-reduced-motion.
donts: Don't ship the bought/templated source-code-sale look — no hero-over-gradient everyone has seen, no stock-photo filler.
Don't write a SaaS landing page: no formulaic hero + feature-grid + CTA pitch, no salesy copy.
Don't stuff buzzword soup — name what was actually built and for whom.
Don't fabricate social proof — invented testimonials, logo walls, vanity metrics.
Don't over-animate. If a motion delays reading the first screen, it's decoration — cut it.
Don't introduce a colored accent inline, add 2px colored border stripes, or attach drop shadows to resting cards.
